hero.headline: Streamline Your Team's Workflow
hero.subheadline: Stackr is the all-in-one project management platform that transforms how teams collaborate and deliver.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing collaborative project management interface. Clean, minimalist design with blue and green UI elements. Multiple team members working together across devices.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Sync tasks, chat, and updates instantly across your entire team's workspace.

features.title: Smart Task Tracking
features.description: AI-powered task prioritization and progress monitoring to keep projects on track.

features.title: Seamless Integrations
features.description: Connect with your favorite tools: Slack, GitHub, Trello, and more.

features.title: Advanced Reporting
features.description: Comprehensive analytics and customizable dashboards for deep insights.

features.title: Secure Sharing
features.description: Enterprise-grade security with granular permission controls.

testimonials.quote: Stackr revolutionized how our distributed team collaborates. It's like having a project management superpower!
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.title: CTO, TechInnovate

testimonials.quote: We reduced project delivery times by 40% after implementing Stackr. Absolutely game-changing.
testimonials.name: Michael Rodriguez
testimonials.title: CEO, DataDrive Solutions
